Help us maintain safe, clean streets. Re: Help us maintain safe, clean streets. Report potholes, broken lights, damaged infrastructure, and more. Your reports empower city officials to act fast.

Potholes, cracks, uneven pavement, and o: Potholes, cracks, uneven pavement, and other surface damage that poses safety risks.
Broken, malfunctioning, or missing stree: Broken, malfunctioning, or missing street lights affecting pedestrian and driver safety.
Damaged signs, barriers, sidewalks, curb: Damaged signs, barriers, sidewalks, curbs, drainage issues, and other street infrastructure.

Madinova is a civic reporting platform t: Madinova is a civic reporting platform that helps residents notify local authorities about damaged roads, broken streetlights, waste issues, and other public infrastructure problems.
Our mission is simple: make city mainten: Our mission is simple: make city maintenance more transparent and faster by connecting citizens, community feedback, and municipal follow-up in one place.
Every report includes category and locat: Every report includes category and location context so maintenance teams can prioritize urgent issues and update status as work progresses.
Need help with a report or account acces: Need help with a report or account access? Reach our support team and we will respond as soon as possible.
For emergencies or immediate public safe: For emergencies or immediate public safety concerns, please contact your local emergency or municipal hotline.
We collect account data (such as name an: We collect account data (such as name and email), report details, and optional uploaded images to operate the Madinova platform and improve maintenance response quality.
We use this information to authenticate: We use this information to authenticate users, display reports, prevent abuse, and support issue moderation. We do not sell personal information.
Madinova may use cookies and similar tec: Madinova may use cookies and similar technologies for session management, security, and analytics. If Google AdSense is enabled, Google may use cookies to serve personalized or non-personalized ads based on your browsing context.
Third-party vendors, including Google, m: Third-party vendors, including Google, may use cookies to show ads. Users can manage ad personalization settings through Google's Ads Settings and browser cookie controls.
If you need data correction or deletion: If you need data correction or deletion assistance, contact us through the Contact page.
By using Fix Street, you agree to submit: By using Fix Street, you agree to submit accurate, lawful, and respectful reports. You are responsible for the content you publish, including text, images, and comments.
Prohibited activity includes false repor: Prohibited activity includes false reporting, harassment, spam, hate speech, and uploading illegal or harmful content. Violations may result in content removal or account restrictions.
The platform includes moderation by admi: The platform includes moderation by administrators. Admins may review, update status, hide, or remove reports and comments to maintain data quality, legal compliance, and public safety.
Fix Street is provided on an 'as availab: Fix Street is provided on an 'as available' basis. We strive for reliability, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted service or immediate issue resolution by municipal teams.
Continued use of the platform indicates: Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of any future policy updates.
